name: CreatorIQ — O2 Weekly Audience Health Alert

nodes.name: Schedule — Every Monday 8am
nodes.notes:
Fires every Monday at 8:00 AM
O2: Audience Churn Early Warning ($15K-$40K/year protected)
For testing: change mode to 'everyMinute'

nodes.name: Code — Load Health Data
nodes.notes:
Loads 5 creators with health metrics.
Production: replace with HTTP Request to read processed CSV.
Outputs: health_score, risk_level, engagement_rate, revenue_at_risk

nodes.name: IF — At Risk? (Score < 55)
nodes.notes:
TRUE: health_score < 55 (Critical or Alert) → send urgent alert
FALSE: health_score ≥ 55 (Watch or Safe) → send weekly summary

nodes.name: Set — Urgent Alert
nodes.notes:
Formats urgent alert for Critical/Alert creators.
Includes: revenue at risk, recommended actions, trend direction.

nodes.name: Set — Weekly Summary
nodes.notes:
Formats normal weekly summary for Watch/Safe creators.
No urgent action needed — positive reinforcement.

nodes.name: Merge — All Alerts
nodes.notes: Combines urgent alerts and weekly summaries into single output.

nodes.name: Code — Build Weekly Report
nodes.notes:
Aggregates all creator health data into one weekly report.
Outputs: urgent_alerts[], healthy_creators[], total_revenue_at_risk.

nodes.name: HTTP Request — Send Report
nodes.notes:
Sends weekly health report to webhook/email.
Replace URL with: your email webhook, Slack webhook, or frontend API.
Retry: 3 attempts, 5s delay (matches lab pattern).
